name: Loving Touch Transportation
inc_date: 2007 (company-stated year founded; exact LARA filing date not retrieved)
entity_status: active (operating per current company website & Yelp listings updated 2026)
registry_source: Michigan LARA (Corporations Online Filing System) - not directly retrieved; company self-reports as a Michigan sub-S corporation with a Michigan Limousine Certificate of Authority
notes: SAFER keyword search for 'LOVING TOUCH TRANSPORTATION' returns only LOVING TOUCH TRANSPORTATION SERVICE (USDOT 2346692) in Jonesboro, GA - that is a DIFFERENT carrier. No FMCSA/USDOT record matches the Michigan Clinton Township company. Company website (lovingtouchtransportation.com) confirms Michigan intrastate operation only with a state Limousine Certificate of Authority (no federal USDOT required for intrastate non-CMV passenger ops). Founded 2007 per company About page. Serves Macomb, Oakland, St. Clair, Livingston counties; NEMT / wheelchair transport - NOT a school-bus operator.

name: Transport Care Svc LLC
fmcsa_address: 121 Executive Center Dr Ste 113, Columbia, SC 29210
fmcsa_status: active (USDOT) / NOT AUTHORIZED (operating authority - private or intrastate only)
registry_source: BBB business profile; US DOT DBE program listing; SC SOS bizfile not directly fetched (portal requires interactive session)
notes: FMCSA legal name 'TRANSPORT CARE SERVICES' USDOT 3964873 matches input address 121 Executive Center Dr Ste 113, Columbia, SC 29210 exactly. Power units 50 / drivers 65 per SAFER snapshot. Status: USDOT ACTIVE but operating authority NOT AUTHORIZED (meaning company conducts private/intrastate paratransit, not for-hire interstate). Zero inspections, zero crashes 24-mo period ending 06/03/2026. No safety rating. Company rebranded as TCS Mobility (tcsmobility.com). Services include paratransit, student transport, municipal services, NEMT. Founded 2009 per BBB; founder/President Christopher Land has 40+ years transport experience. RELEVANT TO STUDENT-TRANSPORT TUCK-IN THESIS - company explicitly lists student transport as a service line.
